title: France
text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France. It is situated on the river Seine.

title: Germany
text: Berlin is the capital and largest city of Germany. It has a population of about 3.7 million.

title: Japan
text: Tokyo is the capital of Japan and the most populous metropolitan area in the world.

title: Mathematics
text: The speed of light in a vacuum is exactly 299,792,458 metres per second, denoted c.

title: History
text: World War II ended in 1945. The Allied forces accepted Germany's unconditional surrender on May 8, 1945.
